nodes.context: Camorra clan operating in the northeast periphery of Naples, specifically in San Pietro a Patierno and Secondigliano.
Camorra alliance; Gaetano Bocchetti was a proponent of this alliance.

edges.evidence_quote: Il clan prende il nome da Gennaro Sacco e Gaetano Bocchetti , quest'ultimo fautore dell' Alleanza di Secondigliano .
edges.context: Gaetano Bocchetti, a namesake of the clan, was a proponent of the Alleanza di Secondigliano, indicating a cooperative tie.
